cursor.required: Cursor is required and must be valid

validation.at_least_one_filter_required: At least one filter must be provided. Pagination (limit, cursor) does not count as a filter.
validation.at_least_one_benefit_filter_required: At least one filter must be provided: codCompania, codSistema, codTipoCobertura, codSubtipoCobertura or estRegistro. Pagination (limit, cursor) does not count as a filter.
validation.at_least_one_coverage_type_filter_requir: At least one filter must be provided: codSistema, codTipoCobertura or codSubtipoCobertura. Pagination (limit, cursor) does not count as a filter.
validation.at_least_one_diagnostic_filter_required: codDiagnostico (non-empty array) is required. estRegistro and codSistema are optional. Pagination (limit, cursor) does not count as a filter.
validation.at_least_one_diagnostic_benefit_filter_r: At least one filter must be provided: codSistemaDiagnosticoBeneficio, codDiagnostico, codBeneficio or estDiagnosticoBeneficio. Pagination (limit, cursor) does not count as a filter.
validation.field_must_be_valid_date: Field '{field}' must be a valid date (format: YYYY-MM-DD)
validation.field_invalid_value: Field '{field}' has a value that is not allowed
validation.field_array_min_size: Field '{field}' must have at least {min} elements
validation.field_string_min_length: Field '{field}' must have at least {min} characters

validation.field_must_be_uuid: Field '{field}' must be a valid UUID
validation.field_must_be_boolean: Field '{field}' must be true or false

validation.exactly_one_filter_required: Provide exactly one filter: codAfiliado or nroDocumento
